text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew. Okay, time for afive-minute break.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me! You're Narita Taishin,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... What's it to you? ...Who even<n>are you?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: I'm... I'm a huge fan of yours!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You are?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I mean—yeah? Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry for just walking up to you like<n>this, but I
wanted to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What for?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
Well... I get teased a lot because of<n>my large
glasses.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
But watching you motivated me to do<n>better for
myself, and I gained the<n>confidence to stand up to
bullies!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I managed to tell them<n>to knock it
off for the first time in my<n>life, so I wanted to thank
you for—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, that had nothing to do with me.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Girl
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, um... Sorry, I didn't mean<n>to...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who found the<n>courage to face
your bullies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You should keep it up and continue<n>making
yourself proud.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Your self-worth has nothing to do with<n>anyone
else. Not even me.
That day, Narita Taishin receives a fan<n>letter.

But its contents are slightly different<n>from what
she usually gets.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be cheering you on whether you<n>like it or not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh. That's the spirit.
